support.summary: No CEO action required; exec connect (if needed) is VP-replaceable.
support.detail: Pladis ($350k, Formal Evaluation, win 48) has a real Economic Buyer gap - no named IT CapEx/CFO sponsor and Decision Maker Jennifer Parise has never joined a call. However, the fix is a standard exec-to-exec introduction (Jennifer Parise / IT leader) that a VP or RSD manager can run; there is no blocked discount, roadmap commitment, or POC guarantee requiring the CEO personally.
support.metric: 0 of 7 buyer touchpoints attended by the Decision Maker
support.why_not_vp: Mapping the IT/CFO buyer and activating Jennifer Parise is routine multi-threading the deal owner's manager can drive; no CEO-only lever (pricing veto, roadmap, peer-CEO relationship) is in play.

monitor.reason: Deal is active and on-track within the window; the only outstanding item is buyer-dependent, not our lapse.
